requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 Transport Safety — Landlocked Corridor Logistics for BESS Cells and Modules
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3及IEC 62281运输安全——乍得内陆走廊物流
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3及IEC 62281運輸安全——乍得內陸走廊物流

summary.en: UN 38.3 requires the standard lithium transport test series (T1–T8) and a test summary for lithium cells, modules, and packs. IEC 62281 provides complementary transport safety and packaging requirements for lithium shipments. For Chad, practical transport planning must additionally account for the landlocked import route: most loads are moved by sea to Douala, Cameroon, then by road to N'Djamena. Importantly, no Chad-specific transport exemption from international lithium regulations is identified for routine utility BESS imports.
summary.zh: UN 38.3要求锂电芯、模组和电池包进行T1–T8测试并提供测试摘要。IEC 62281对锂电池运输安全和包装提供补充要求。对乍得而言，实际物流还需考虑内陆市场特征：大部分货物经海运至喀麦隆杜阿拉后再公路运往恩贾梅纳。关键是不存在可替代国际锂电运输规则的乍得本地豁免。
summary.zht: UN 38.3要求鋰電芯、模組和電池包進行T1–T8測試並提供測試摘要。IEC 62281對鋰電池運輸安全和包裝提供補充要求。對乍得而言，實際物流還需考慮內陸市場特徵：大部分貨物經海運至喀麥隆杜阿拉後再公路運往恩賈梅納。關鍵是不存在可替代國際鋰電運輸規則的乍得本地豁免。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3
IEC 62281:2019+AMD1:2022 — Safety of Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries During Transport
IMDG Code, IATA DGR, and road dangerous-goods conventions for multimodal transport segments
Douala–N'Djamena corridor road logistics should reflect Chad import customs and transit documentation

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers normally carry UN 38.3 test summaries from accredited laboratories and apply CNAS/recognized lab reports for export lots. For Chad-bound shipments this is necessary but must be matched to exact battery design, configuration, and state-of-health assumptions. The main practical work is keeping test summaries current and synchronized with export lots after chemistry or configuration changes.
summary.zh: 中国制造商通常由认可实验室提供UN 38.3测试摘要，并为外销批次配套检测报告。运往乍得亦属此要求，但必须与具体电池设计、组配置和使用假设完全匹配，避免型号不一致。实际工作重点是测试摘要的持续有效性与设计变更后同步更新。
summary.zht: 中國製造商通常由認可實驗室提供UN 38.3測試摘要，並為外銷批次配套檢測報告。運往乍得亦屬此要求，但必須與具體電池設計、組構型和使用假設完全匹配，避免型號不一致。實際工作重點是測試摘要的持續有效性與設計變更後同步更新。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from accredited Chinese laboratories (CNAS/recognized) — required where applicable

gap.en: The gap is mainly scope and execution: (a) test-summary coverage of exact model and chemistry, (b) maintenance of validity after any chemistry/configuration change, (c) road logistics to N'Djamena requiring updated road dangerous-goods paperwork and temperature-risk controls, (d) customs preparation across transshipment through Douala and Cameroon corridor terminals.
gap.zh: 核心差距在于范围与执行：①测试摘要必须覆盖具体型号和化学体系；②设计变更后应重新核验有效性；③经恩贾梅纳的公路段需要更新危险品报关和高温运输控制文件；④在杜阿拉转运与喀麦隆走廊交界地带应提前完成运输文件和边境协调。
gap.zht: 核心差距在於範圍與執行：①測試摘要必須覆蓋具體型號和化學體系；②設計變更後應重新核驗有效性；③經恩賈梅納的公路段需要更新危險品報關和高溫運輸控制文件；④在杜阿拉轉運與喀麥隆走廊交界地帶應提前完成運輸文件和邊境協調。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery shipments to Chad by air, sea, or road; required UN 38.3 and associated dangerous-goods logistics documentation remain applicable across the corridor
mandatory_status.cn: UN 38.3 requirements are mandatory for exports with lithium battery cargo

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Chad-bound BESS exports, UN 38.3 is universal and unavoidable. The practical gap is the corridor adaptation: ensure summaries match the shipped configuration and that road-side transport documents and temperature controls are complete for Douala-to-N'Djamena moves.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 运往乍得的BESS出口必须遵守UN 38.3。实际差距在于走廊适配：确保测试摘要匹配实际发运型号，并确保杜阿拉到恩贾梅纳公路运输文件和高温控制条件齐备。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 運往乍得的BESS出口必須遵守UN 38.3。實際差距在於走廊適配：確保測試摘要匹配實際出運型號，並確保杜阿拉到恩賈梅納公路運輸文件和高溫控制條件齊備。
